description: Khan Academy is a nonprofit online education platform that provides lessons, exercises, and learning tools for students, teachers, and families. Its website hosts educational content across subjects such as math, science, computing, and test prep.
summary: Khan Academy exposes a public unauthenticated MCP server at `https://www.khanacademy.org/api/partner/_mcp-gateway/db8f4a30-0516-45da-9d34-e9bfae33225c/sse`; no public developer REST/GraphQL API credentials were found, and Khan Academy states it no longer offers a public API or API keys/tokens.
